parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({model:'minimax/minimax-m2.7',temperature:0.1,messages:[{role:'user',content:'Clean up this company name for a web search: ' + $json.company_name + '

Rules:
- Remove legal suffixes: Pte Ltd, Ltd, Pte. Ltd., LLP, Inc, Corp, Sdn Bhd
- Preserve meaningful brand words and brand punctuation when it helps exact matching
- Normalize obvious punctuation noise only when it does not change the brand
- Expand common abbreviations only if obvious
- Keep proper nouns and brand names exactly as-is
- If already clean, return as-is
- Do not add any extra words

Examples:
- Pacific Healthcare Holdings Pte. Ltd. -> Pacific Healthcare Holdings
- NKF (Singapore) -> NKF Singapore
- St. Andrew's Mission Hospital -> St Andrews Mission Hospital
- DR+ Medical & Paincare Bishan -> DR+ Medical Paincare Bishan

Output: cleaned name only, one line.'}]}) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({q: $('OpenRouter - Clean Name').item.json.choices[0].message.content.trim() + ' Singapore official website', num: 5}) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({q: 'site:linkedin.com/company ' + $('Parse Parent Company').item.json.company_homepage_name + (($('Parse Parent Company').item.json.parent_company || '') !== ($('Parse Parent Company').item.json.company_homepage_name || '') ? ' ' + $('Parse Parent Company').item.json.parent_company : '') + ' Singapore', num: 5}) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({model:'minimax/minimax-m2.7',temperature:0.1,messages:[{role:'user',content:'Company: ' + $('OpenRouter - Clean Name').item.json.choices[0].message.content.trim() + '
Serper results:
' + ($('Serper - Search').item.json.organic || []).map(function(r){return r.title + ' | ' + r.link}).join('
') + '
Already used URLs in sheet: ' + $('Prep URL Data').item.json.existing_urls.join(', ') + '

Pick the single best official URL for ' + $('OpenRouter - Clean Name').item.json.choices[0].message.content.trim() + '.

Rules:
- Must not already exist in the already used URLs list
- If all valid URLs are already in the list, output: duplicate
- Prefer .com.sg, .org.sg, .sg domains
- A parent company or group holding URL is acceptable
- Reject: Facebook, Instagram, LinkedIn, Recordowl, Healthhub, directories, news articles, government listing pages
- If no valid match exists, output: none

Output: URL only, or duplicate, or none. One line.'}]}) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({model:'minimax/minimax-m2.7',temperature:0.1,messages:[{role:'user',content:'Company: ' + $('OpenRouter - Clean Name').item.json.choices[0].message.content.trim() + '
URL: ' + ($json.best_url || '').trim() + '

Is this URL the official website of ' + $('OpenRouter - Clean Name').item.json.choices[0].message.content.trim() + ' or a legitimate parent/group company?

Accept if:
- Domain clearly matches company name or known parent brand
- It is a real business homepage (.com, .org, .sg, .com.sg, .net)

Reject if:
- Facebook, Instagram, LinkedIn, Recordowl, Healthhub, directory, aggregator, news article, government listing
- URL is none

Output rules:
- If accepted: output the URL exactly as given
- If rejected: output empty string

Output: URL or empty.'}]}) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ url: $('Parse HTTP Status').item.json.best_url, company_name: $('OpenRouter - Clean Name').item.json.choices[0].message.content.trim(), market: 'Singapore' }) }}

parameters.jsCode:
const websiteContent = ($('Crawl4AI - Scrape').item.json.website_content || '').substring(0, 15000);
const companyClean = $('OpenRouter - Clean Name').item.json.choices[0].message.content.trim();
const websiteUrl = String($('Crawl4AI - Scrape').item.json.final_url || $('Check URL Against All').item.json.best_url || '').trim();
const body = {
  model: 'minimax/minimax-m2.7',
  temperature: 0,
  messages: [{
    role: 'user',
    content: `Website URL: ${websiteUrl}
Website content: ${websiteContent}

Company: ${companyClean}

Is ${companyClean} HIA-relevant in Singapore?

Return exactly one label:
- YES
- VENDOR
- NO

Definitions:
- YES: A Singapore healthcare service provider, healthcare operator, community care or social service healthcare organisation, nursing home, clinic group, hospital, dialysis centre, lab, radiology provider, pharmacy, dental provider, or a holding / group / parent entity that owns, operates, manages, groups, brands, or controls Singapore healthcare providers.
- VENDOR: A non-provider company selling technology, software, cybersecurity, AI, equipment, or services into Singapore healthcare providers.
- NO: A business with no healthcare provider operations, no healthcare ownership, and no clear healthcare-provider customer base.

Critical classification rules:
- If the company is a healthcare holding company, clinic group parent, brand parent, or medical group parent in Singapore, classify as YES.
- If the website shows it owns, operates, manages, groups, brands, or controls healthcare clinics/providers, classify as YES even if the legal entity includes Holdings, Group, Limited, or Pte Ltd.
- If the website shows multiple clinics, locations, medical centres, provider brands, or a clinic network under one group, classify as YES.
- Do not classify a healthcare parent/group as NO just because the entity name is corporate.
- Community care, eldercare, social service, nursing home, or medical charity organisations serving healthcare patients are YES.
- Use VENDOR when the company is not itself a provider/operator but clearly sells into Singapore healthcare providers.
- If there is credible provider ownership, operations, or care delivery, prefer YES.
- If there is credible healthcare-provider customer targeting but no care delivery, prefer VENDOR.
- Reserve NO for clearly irrelevant businesses or websites with no meaningful healthcare signal.

Examples of YES:
- a clinic group parent that owns Singapore clinics
- a healthcare holdings company with several clinic brands or locations
- a nursing home operator
- a medical charity or community care organisation delivering healthcare services
- a healthcare group that operates clinics, hospitals, labs, pharmacies, or radiology centres

Examples of VENDOR:
- a cybersecurity firm selling into hospitals and clinics
- a SaaS platform serving healthcare providers
- a healthcare AI or software vendor that does not itself deliver care
- a consulting or managed service company focused on healthcare providers

Examples of NO:
- a generic holding company with no healthcare operations shown
- a non-healthcare services company with no provider customer base shown
- an obvious retail, F&B, education, property, or generic logistics business

Output: one word only: YES / VENDOR / NO`
  }]
};
return [{ json: { requestBody: body } }];

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ company_name: $json.company_name, company_homepage_name: $json.company_homepage_name, parent_company: $json.parent_company, company_linkedin_url: $json.company_linkedin_url, serper_results: $json.serper_results, best_url: $json.best_url, url_validated: $json.url_validated, website_content: $json.website_content, hia_relevant: $json.hia_relevant, industry_segment: $json.industry_segment, hia_batch: $json.hia_batch, company_size: $json.company_size, product_descriptor: $json.product_descriptor, compliance_lead: $json.compliance_lead, first_name: $json.first_name, role: $json.role, email: $json.email, linkedin_url: $json.linkedin_url, contact_source: $json.contact_source, status: $json.status }) }}

parameters.jsCode: return $input.all();
return $input.all();

const d = $('Prep Outreach Context').item.json;
const body = {
  model: 'minimax/minimax-m2.7',
  temperature: 0.1,
  messages: [{
    role: 'user',
    content: `Company: ${d.company_name_clean}
Industry: ${d.industry_segment}
HIA batch: ${d.hia_batch}
Compliance lead: ${d.compliance_lead}
Company size: ${d.company_size}
Role: ${d.role}
HIA relevant: ${d.hia_relevant} (YES = healthcare provider or healthcare group parent, VENDOR = tech/SaaS vendor selling to healthcare)

Determine:
1. vendor_pain: The specific compliance or operational pain this company faces in the context of Singapore HIA 2027. Max 15 words.
   - YES (healthcare provider / healthcare group): their internal compliance challenge
   - VENDOR: the pain their healthcare clients face that creates demand for their product

2. grant_eligibility: Most applicable Singapore HIA co-funding grants. Must be exactly one of:
   NCG + CSA CISOaaS + PSG — SME GP clinic, dental, pharmacy, nursing home, dialysis, lab, radiology
   NCG + CSA CISOaaS — SME HIA licensee where PSG eligibility is uncertain
   CSA CISOaaS + PSG — VENDOR company whose healthcare SME clients qualify
   NCSS TSS — Community care or social service organisation that is an NCSS member
   NCG only — Enterprise or large hospital
   Verify eligibility — Unknown, niche, or complex eligibility

3. compliance_trigger: A short phrase, max 12 words, describing the most relevant reason this company should care now.
   Examples:
   - clinic clients need CSDS evidence for renewal
   - audit evidence needs central ownership
   - healthcare buyers now ask vendor readiness questions
   - HIA batch timing raises execution pressure

4. evidence_gap: A short phrase, max 8 words, describing the likely operational weakness.
   Examples:
   - evidence sits across teams
   - no clear internal owner
   - audit prep stays manual
   - security work gets pushed down the list

5. executive_angle: A short phrase, max 10 words, describing the most relevant board / leadership lens.
   Examples:
   - avoid last-minute compliance scramble
   - reduce internal lift before renewal
   - protect buyer confidence in sales cycles
   - clarify ownership before deadline pressure

6. cta_style:
   If role contains CEO, founder, managing director, GM, COO, CFO:
   use one of:
   - Worth sharing a one-page view?
   - Is this already owned internally?
   - Relevant now, or too early?
   - Open to a short note on what this usually involves?

   If role contains CIO, CTO, CISO, Head of IT, IT Director:
   use one of:
   - Want me to send it across?
   - Open to a short note on the readiness path?
   - Worth sharing the checklist?
   - Relevant to look at now?

   Otherwise:
   use one of:
   - Worth a short note?
   - Relevant now, or too early?
   - Open to a one-page summary?

Grant rules:
- SME GP / dental / pharmacy / nursing home / lab / radiology → NCG + CSA CISOaaS + PSG
- VENDOR (tech selling to healthcare clients) → CSA CISOaaS + PSG
- Social service org / community care / eldercare under NCSS → NCSS TSS
- Enterprise hospital system / listed company → NCG only
- Unknown or niche → Verify eligibility

Output JSON: {"vendor_pain":"","grant_eligibility":"","compliance_trigger":"","evidence_gap":"","executive_angle":"","cta_style":""}
Output: valid JSON only. No markdown.`
  }]
};
return [{ json: { requestBody: body, _ctx: d } }];

const d = $json;
return [{ json: {
  status:            d.status,
  vendor_pain:       d.vendor_pain,
  grant_eligibility: d.grant_eligibility,
  compliance_trigger: d.compliance_trigger,
  evidence_gap:      d.evidence_gap,
  executive_angle:   d.executive_angle,
  cta_style:         d.cta_style,
  subject_line_1: d.subject_line_1,
  email_body_1:   d.email_body_1,
  subject_line_2: d.subject_line_2,
  email_body_2:   d.email_body_2,
  subject_line_3: d.subject_line_3,
  email_body_3:   d.email_body_3,
  subject_line_4: d.subject_line_4,
  email_body_4:   d.email_body_4
} }];
return $('Parse Pending IDs').all();

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ company_name: $json.company_name, company_homepage_name: $json.company_homepage_name, parent_company: $json.parent_company, company_linkedin_url: $json.company_linkedin_url, serper_results: $json.serper_results, best_url: $json.best_url, url_validated: $json.url_validated, website_content: $json.website_content, hia_relevant: $json.hia_relevant, industry_segment: $json.industry_segment, hia_batch: $json.hia_batch, company_size: $json.company_size, product_descriptor: $json.product_descriptor, compliance_lead: $json.compliance_lead, first_name: '', role: '', email: '', linkedin_url: '', contact_source: 'none', status: 'no contact found' }) }}
